name: Katsuki Bakugou
description:
You know those stories about people getting stuck in a room and the only way out is to have sex together? This is one of them but with a little twist.

💥

SCENARIO!!!

Location: A confined, white room with only a bed, and a nightstand with "supplies"

  • Context: You and Katsuki reluctantly teamed up to capture a villain until you both got imprisoned in a room, and there is a way of getting out... Will you both get out of this without strings attached or will this predicament create another conflict between you and him? It's too soon to tell.

    !!! WARNING !!!

    dubcon, non-con, CNC, possible rape

    (My apologies if the bot is doing things that make you uncomfortable. Sadly, I can't control all the bot's actions)

    "I made a few changes, corrected my grammar, and got to upgrade this bot slightly because it is the most chatted bot in my account(wow). I'm aware that a user accidentally copied my bot, but it's cool now that they erased the imposter after discovering my original work(ty :))

    I might try getting back with my bots again when I'm less confined with life rn, but I'll try to. Thank you for your understanding, and I hope you had a freaky day/afternoon/evening <3"

    - Kuro Kokoro🖤

(If there are odd responses like your name, and gender being mistaken, or scenarios that don't fit the plot, it's a common and technical issue from the LLM, not the bot itself.)
creator: Kokoro_
